{{Quote|Isela and I lived here—Toma and Ji and Norika next to us on this side.|Akanah Norand Goss Pell, upon discovering the ruins of Ialtra|<ref name="Storm" />}}
'''Ji''' was an individual who lived in the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] religious order's [[City/Legends|village]] [[Ialtra]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lucazec/Legends|Lucazec]] with the Fallanassi [[Toma (Fallanassi)|Toma]] and [[Norika]]. Ji also neighbored a [[Gender/Legends|girl]] named [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]],<ref name="Storm" /> and the pair were friends.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|162|Ji}}</ref> By [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Before the Storm]]'' establishes that [[Ialtra]] was ransacked prior to the novel's events. As ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the ''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'' trilogy—which includes ''Before the Storm''—as starting in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and ending in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the settlement must have been ravaged by 16 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> neighboring settlements [[Big Hill]] and [[Jisasu]] ransacked Ialtra, fearing the Fallanassi and their [[Force power/Legends|powers]]. The village was heavily damaged and abandoned after the raid, though Ji and the others escaped without being [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="Storm" />

Between 16 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Akanah returned to her childhood home and found it in ruins. Greatly distraught by this revelation, Akanah was convinced that she would have [[Force sense/Legends|felt]] her friends touch the [[White Current/Legends|White Current]] if they had died. She and her guest, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], determined that Ji and the others had escaped in [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Storm" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ji was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[Before the Storm]]'' by [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]], the first novel in ''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'' trilogy.<ref name="Storm" />
